     Never hand-edit; stale anchors are rebuilt, not fixed. -->

# Code Anchors: PR-Driven Post-Merge Flow

- `libs/pr-worktree/src/pr.ts` — resolves a pull request's merge state and commit identifiers via the host CLI; distinguishes an open PR from a not-found one, returning a typed record.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/range.ts` — derives the close range anchored on the merge commit and verified against the PR head; correct for squash, true-merge, and rebase, and refuses an empty, non-ancestor, or ambiguously unverifiable range.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/worktree.ts` — idempotent create and force-remove of the worktree (analyze: detached at the PR head; close: a fresh distill branch cut from the trunk); rejects member repos.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/identity.ts` — resolves the checkout role and rejects a workspace member repo up front.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/run.ts` — the single git and gh process seam every step runs through, so specs can inject a runner.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/diagnostic.ts` — the typed failure shapes the shim surfaces with named exit codes.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/render.ts` — the one-JSON-object success output and named diagnostics the shim prints.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/range.spec.ts` — proves range correctness against real squash, merge-commit, and rebase topologies.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/identity.spec.ts` — proves member-repo rejection and role resolution.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/worktree.spec.ts` — proves idempotent worktree create and force-remove.
- `libs/pr-worktree/src/pr.spec.ts` — proves merge-state resolution with an injected gh runner.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-pr-worktree/SKILL.md` — the CLI shim doc: preflight, open, and remove subcommands; single-repo and hub only.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-pr-worktree/scripts/pr_worktree.ts` — the shim entry over the helper library: one JSON object on success, a named diagnostic and exit 0/1/2 on failure.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.analyze.md` — the --pr mode: conformance in a worktree at the PR head, published as a PR review carrying a machine-readable receipt block.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — the --pr mode: post-merge close in a worktree on a fresh distill branch, reading the analyze verdict from the PR review, pushing the close artifacts, handing off to distill.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.distill.md` — the continuation mode that resumes in the close worktree and derives the diff from the stamped range.
